examples: Objective: to evaluate the diagnostic value of spiral ct scan with hypotonicity for gastric cancer.
Methods Isolated mouse cardiac ventricular myocytes were subjected to whole-cell patch-clamp to record the hypotonicity activated chloride channel currents.
Methods After being exposed to colchicine, the gonadal cells of P. westermani were treated by the following procedures: hypotonicity, fixation, dropping onto a slide and staining.
